events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: The legendary Queen guitarist and astrophysicist Sir Brian May was born on this day in 1947.

angles.name: Brian May Birthday
angles.copy: Rock royalty Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday today. What's your all-time favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The iconic Rolling Stones frontman, Sir Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Mick Jagger Birthday
angles.copy: He's still got the moves! Wishing a very happy 83rd birthday to the legendary Mick Jagger.

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television, MTV, launched on this day in 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' being the very first music video aired.

angles.name: MTV Launch Anniversary
angles.copy: 45 years since MTV burst onto our screens, changing music forever. What was your favourite video from back in the day?

events.title: Oasis' Definitely Maybe turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on this day in 1994, featuring classics like 'Live Forever' and 'Supersonic'.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: Thirty-two years ago, Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the game. What's your standout track?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began 57 years ago
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, kicked off on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Woodstock Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since the peace, love, and music began at Woodstock. If you could have been there, who would you have seen?

events.title: Remembering Elvis Presley, 49 years on
events.blurb: On this day in 1977, the world mourned the passing of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley.

angles.name: Elvis Death Anniversary
angles.copy: Forty-nine years today since we lost the King. What's your favourite Elvis track that still gets you moving?

events.title: Remembering Tupac Shakur, 30 years on
events.blurb: On this day in 1996, the influential rapper Tupac Shakur tragically passed away.

angles.name: Tupac Death Anniversary
angles.copy: Thirty years since we lost a hip-hop icon. Remembering Tupac Shakur today and his incredible legacy.

events.title: Remembering Jimi Hendrix, 56 years on
events.blurb: The legendary guitarist Jimi Hendrix passed away on this day in 1970, leaving behind an unparalleled musical legacy.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Death Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-six years ago today, the world lost a true guitar hero. What's your favourite Jimi Hendrix riff?

events.title: The Beatles' Abbey Road turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic 'Abbey Road' album, featuring that famous zebra crossing cover, on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since The Beatles gave us the masterpiece that is 'Abbey Road'. What's your favourite track from the album?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Happy 75th birthday to the trailblazing lead singer of The Pretenders, Chrissie Hynde.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde Birthday
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible Chrissie Hynde, who turns 75 today. A true rock icon!

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: The distinctive voice of Oasis and solo artist Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday today.

angles.name: Liam Gallagher Birthday
angles.copy: Definitely, maybe a big party! Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher.

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' released 51 years ago
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic peace anthem 'Imagine' was released as a single in the UK on this day in 1975.

angles.name: Imagine Release Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-one years since John Lennon gave the world 'Imagine'. A timeless message that resonates as much today as it did then.

events.title: The first iPod launched 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the very first iPod on this day in 2001, revolutionising how we listen to music.

angles.name: iPod Anniversary
angles.copy: Twenty-five years since the original iPod dropped! How many songs did you cram onto yours?

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: Today marks James Bond Day, celebrating the premiere of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: James Bond Day
angles.copy: Shaken, not stirred! Happy James Bond Day to all the 007 fans out there. Who's your favourite Bond?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering the legendary John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: John Lennon Birthday
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we celebrate the enduring legacy of John Lennon.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The iconic comedian, actor, and writer John Cleese, known for Monty Python and Fawlty Towers, celebrates his 87th birthday today.

angles.name: John Cleese Birthday
angles.copy: And now for something completely different... Happy 87th birthday to the brilliant John Cleese!

events.title: The Beatles' 'White Album' turns 58
events.blurb: The Beatles released their groundbreaking double album, officially titled 'The Beatles' but known as the 'White Album', on this day in 1968.

angles.name: White Album Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-eight years since The Beatles' 'White Album' dropped, showcasing their incredible versatility. What's your hidden gem from the tracklist?
